description: Existing Python monorepo. User asks to add a new FastAPI billing service with a PostgreSQL backend and a docker-compose entry.
user_message: Add a new FastAPI microservice called 'billing-service' to our monorepo at services/billing-service. It needs PostgreSQL via SQLAlchemy 2.x async, Alembic migrations, a /healthz endpoint, and an entry in our docker-compose.yml. Follow whatever pattern is already established in services/orders-service.
notes: Multi-service work activates the microservices plus architecture plus database-design union. The docker-runtime rule triggers because of the compose entry.
